docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) ANDRE SPENCER, REGIONAL MANAGER AND WILLIAM PAK, STORE MANAGER FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-13-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PETERS, MARCUS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,073.92 FILED BY PETERS, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-11-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETERS, MARCUS AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC
DECLARATION RESET HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PETERS, MARCUS
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-30-2026 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-11-2026 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-04-2026, PERSONAL SERVICE, SERVICE FEE: $50.00 AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO TIRE & SERVICE CENTRAL INC
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-30-2026 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO APR-13-2026 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
EXHIBITS RECEIVED BY MAIL FROM PLAINTIFF PETERS, MARCUS

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-13-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-13-2026 BY VISITING JUDGE TRUE. PLAINTIFF MARCUS PETERS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO & TIRE SERVICE CENTRAL INC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY ANDRE SPENCER, REGIONAL MANAGER AND PETER PAK, . PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT/NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN M. TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
